data.content: Implemented stable scrollbar gutter reservation in src/app/globals.css so the shared top nav stays anchored when ReTakes or Diagnostics do not need a body scrollbar. Added a regression assertion in src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: foolery-44f1. Commit: ddbde9dda1cb.
